mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_key, m.menu_name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.is_enabled, m.created_at, m.updated_at, p.menu_name AS parent_name FROM menus m LEFT JOIN menus p ON p.id = m.parent_id ORDER BY COALESCE(m.parent_id, m.id), m.sort_order, m.id

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_key, m.menu_name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.is_enabled, m.created_at, m.updated_at, p.menu_name AS parent_name FROM menus m LEFT JOIN menus p ON p.id = m.parent_id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT id, parent_id, menu_key, menu_name, path, icon, sort_order, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM menus WHERE menu_key = #{menuKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus ( parent_id, menu_key, menu_name, path, icon, sort_order, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{menuKey}, #{menuName}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_key = #{menuKey}, menu_name = #{menuName}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, menu_key, menu_name, path, icon, sort_order, is_enabled FROM menus WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, id), sort_order, id
